data.title: Quantum researcher awarded 1 BTC as quantum computer breaks 15-bit key, marking significant progress in Bitcoin security.
data.description: Project Eleven has granted an Italian researcher with 1 Bitcoin after successfully breaking a 15-bit elliptic curve key using a public quantum computer, marking a significant milestone as the largest public demonstration of its kind so far.

data.title: Cable Giant Charter Stock Sinks After Customer Exodus Accelerates
data.description: Charter Communications Inc. shares (NASDAQ: CHTR) saw a steep decline following the release of their weaker-than-expected fiscal first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported quarterly revenue of $13.597 billion, a 1.0% decrease compared to the previous year but slightly higher than the analyst consensus of $13.539 billion. Earnings per share came in at $9.17, falling short of the expected $9.98. The drop in revenue was primarily attributed to underperformance in residential video. Charter lost 120,000 internet customers during the quarter, a significant increase from the 59,000 loss during the same period last year. The total number of video customers dropped by 60,000, an improvement from the 181,000 decrease in the prior year, thanks to revised pricing, packaging strategies, and the addition of streaming apps to Spectrum's basic packages. However, there was a positive trend in mobile services as the company acquired 368,000 new mobile lines, totaling at 12.1 million.

data.title: Churchill Downs Racetrack, LG&E and KU Team Up Green Energy Partnership for 152nd Kentucky Derby
data.description: For the fourth year running, The Run for the Roses® in Louisville, Kentucky will be powered by renewable energy. This initiative, starting in April 24, 2026, marks a continuation of the event's commitment to sustainability. Churchill Downs Racetrack ("Churchill Downs") has collaborated with local partners, such as Louisville Gas, to ensure the race is run on green energy. This ongoing effort signifies a commitment to environmental stewardship and underscores the increasing importance of sustainable practices in high-profile events.

data.description: Those with insider status could potentially gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders cannot access. The planned deals might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the company to talk about their rights and choices without incurring any expenses.

data.title: Trace Systems Wins $64,000,000 U.S Army Follow-On Contract to Deliver Enhanced Deployable Communications Capabilities
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on April 24, 2026, Trace Systems Inc. secured a new $64 million contract extension from the U.S. Army's Global Tactical Advanced Communications Systems and Services (GTACS II) program. This five-year task order will allow Trace to provide essential deployable services.

data.title: DOJ Drops Powell Probe, Clearing Way For Kevin Warsh To Lead Federal Reserve
data.description: It is expected that a decision regarding Powell's tenure beyond May will be made next week. The Department of Justice has halted the investigation into Powell, paving the way for Kevin Warsh to potentially take the lead at the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Battle Of The Weight-Loss Pills Continues With A Shocking Twist
data.description: Stock of Eli Lilly experienced a decline at the start of Friday due to Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy surpassing Lilly's new weight-loss medication, Foundayo. This ongoing competition between the two weight-loss pills is causing a stir in the market.

data.title: Insider Trading Scandals Compound Prediction Market Pressures; Two Stocks Downgraded
data.description: A U.S. soldier has been charged by the Department of Justice for engaging in insider trading on prediction markets. Following this development, popular companies DraftKings and Flutter experienced downgrades. The incident highlights the intensifying pressure on prediction markets due to insider trading scandals. As a result, two stocks were downgraded in the wake of the controversy.

data.title: Amazon Stock Rallies To Record High On Meta AI Chip Deal
data.description: Meta has reached a deal with Amazon's cloud business to supply CPUs for its AI operations. This collaboration has led to Amazon's stock rallying to a record high, showcasing a positive response from investors. The partnership between the two tech giants is significant, with Amazon's cloud business playing a crucial role in supporting Meta's AI endeavors. The market's positive reaction is evident as Amazon's stock hits a new milestone following news of the AI chip deal with Meta.
